data.title: SoFi's Q4 earnings and revenue exceed expectations, stock rises initially but later reverses down.
data.description: SoFi's stock saw an increase following the fintech company's announcement of Q4 earnings and revenue that exceeded Wall Street expectations. The report highlighted record member additions during this period. However, shortly after this news, the fintech stock experienced a reversal in direction.

data.title: Bitmine Immersion (NYSE: BMNR) stock fell due to Ethereum's 6% drop to $2,743.53 and Bitcoin traded at $83,195.06. Tom Lee advised against abandoning Ethereum despite market fluctuations.
data.description: Shares of Bitmine Immersion Technologies Inc. (NYSE: BMNR) saw a decline as Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) continued to fall during afternoon trading, with Ethereum dropping by 6% to $2,743.53. Meanwhile, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) was trading at $83,195.06. Tom Lee from Fundstrat advised investors against abandoning Ethereum due to Fear of Missing Out (FOMO), in response to a post from Bitmine pointing out the significant year-to-date increases of 18% for gold and 52% for silver. Lee emphasized the importance of sticking with successful investments and not making hasty decisions driven by FOMO.

data.title: Trump nominates Kevin Warsh to replace Jerome Powell at Fed. Warsh, a former governor, has mixed views on crypto.
data.description: Kevin Warsh has been chosen by President Trump to replace Jerome Powell, as the nominee for the position. Warsh, a former Federal Reserve governor, has diverse opinions on cryptocurrency.

data.title: Trump nominates Kevin Warsh as new Federal Reserve Chair to succeed Jerome Powell in May 2026. Warsh, a critic of QE, aims for policy reset.
data.description: President Donald Trump has nominated Kevin Warsh to lead the Federal Reserve, citing his experience, independence, and credibility. Warsh, a former Fed governor, is expected to take over from Jerome Powell in May 2026. As an opponent of the Fed's quantitative easing (QE) policies, Warsh has criticized the program for benefiting the wealthy and not delivering strong economic results. His nomination has sparked debate over the future of U.S. monetary policy, especially regarding the Fed's balance sheet. Warsh currently holds positions at the Hoover Institution, Stanford Graduate School of Business, and Duquesne Family Office LLC. His nomination highlights the potential shift in Fed leadership and policy approach moving forward.

data.title: Rose Sarfo Scholarship for Healthcare Students now accepting applications to support healthcare undergraduate students across US.
data.description: As of January 30, 2026, The Rose Sarfo Scholarship for Healthcare Students has opened its annual application period. This scholarship is available to undergraduate students nationwide in the field of healthcare. The scholarship aims to support students by providing financial assistance.

data.title: Dow Jones falls on surprise inflation data and Warsh nomination; Visa tumbles. Tesla rallies on SpaceX news.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to unexpected inflation figures and the announcement of the Warsh nomination. Conversely, Tesla saw gains following positive news from SpaceX. Visa also suffered a downturn. The stock market report highlighted these events, emphasizing the impact on the Dow Jones index.
